Patch Set 8:

> Even though "Test-Parameters: trivial" was detected, this deeply
 > suspicious bot still run some testing

It would be interesting if the bot could detect that this was only a comment change, but probably that is rare enough that it isn't going to save more testing time than invested in writing and verifying the check for this case.

Patch Set 8:

> > Even though "Test-Parameters: trivial" was detected, this deeply
 > > suspicious bot still run some testing
 > 
 > It would be interesting if the bot could detect that this was only
 > a comment change, but probably that is rare enough that it isn't
 > going to save more testing time than invested in writing and
 > verifying the check for this case.

I've been thinking about that and more importantly trying to see what particular subtests were added/modified to better highlight if they failed or were always skipped, but that's been on the backburner for some time.

parents.subject: LU-12410 tests: ignore return status of removal of 99-lustre-test.rules

commit.subject: LU-7912 osc: Remove stale comment in osc_page_transfer_add
commit.message:
LU-7912 osc: Remove stale comment in osc_page_transfer_add

Ever since LU-3321 the fileds were not shared,
but then ops_inflight was completely deleted too.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Change-Id: I7b235f10ddb26a7ddbd4de7e502d33ee81a4f2e3
Signed-off-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/19115
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
